query: I keep considering quiet plans before checks captures and threats
My undefended bishop was attacked and I lost it to a fork
I moved my queen repeatedly and fell behind in development
I delayed castling and allowed checks against my exposed king
I missed a capture that removed the defender and won material
I grabbed a pawn instead of developing minor pieces and castling
My king had no luft and was trapped by a back rank threat
An undefended rook became the target of a pin and skewer
